name: Osmosis (IBC)
shortDescription: Cross-chain liquidity and pools — Osmosis integration announced on the Safrochain roadmap.
description: Osmosis is a leading AMM in the Cosmos ecosystem. The Safrochain roadmap includes an Osmosis integration (liquidity pools, IBC) to connect SAF liquidity to the broader interchain.
statusNote: Listed on the roadmap; not live yet.
